assertions: After `/zoto-cursor-top-init`, the assistant delegates to `scripts/install-local.ts` (via `pnpm install-local`, `pnpm exec tsx scripts/install-local.ts`, or `npx -y tsx scripts/install-local.ts`) instead of hand-rolling copy or symlink steps.
The workflow includes building `dist/cli.js` when missing, installing runtime dependencies with `npm install --omit=dev`, and registering the plugin under `~/.cursor/plugins/zoto-cursor-top/`.
The confirmation names the install directory, the `cursor-top` symlink path when created, a reminder to restart Cursor, and `cursor-top --help` (or `cursor-top --demo`) as verification.
The assistant does not launch the interactive cursor-top TUI from this init command.

primitive_analysis.summary: One-time setup command that delegates to install-local.ts for build, runtime deps, plugin registration, and PATH symlink; supports --dry-run, --no-symlink, and --bin-dir.

cases.expected_output: The assistant runs the canonical installer from the resolved plugin root and prints a short success summary with install path, symlink, restart reminder, and a verification command—without opening the TUI.

assertions: After `/zoto-cursor-top-init --dry-run`, forwarded arguments include `--dry-run` so install-local previews steps without writing files or symlinks.
The assistant still resolves the plugin root in the documented order and does not mutate `~/.cursor/plugins/zoto-cursor-top/` on this run.

primitive_analysis.summary: One-time setup command that delegates to install-local.ts for build, runtime deps, plugin registration, and PATH symlink; supports --dry-run, --no-symlink, and --bin-dir.

cases.expected_output: The assistant previews install-local steps and reports what would happen without performing the install.

assertions: After `/zoto-cursor-top-init --no-symlink`, the delegated install-local invocation includes `--no-symlink`.
Closing guidance explains how to run cursor-top from the plugin directory or add a bin dir manually when no PATH symlink is created.

primitive_analysis.summary: One-time setup command that delegates to install-local.ts for build, runtime deps, plugin registration, and PATH symlink; supports --dry-run, --no-symlink, and --bin-dir.

cases.expected_output: The assistant completes install-local without creating a PATH symlink and documents how to invoke cursor-top afterward.
